abstract.t: This document outlines a set of improvements to the WebRTC session setup protocols aimed at significantly reducing connection setup latency. This improved setup mechanism is known as the WebRTC Abridged Roundtrip Protocol (WARP). By addressing inefficiencies within the current multi-protocol handshake process, WARP can reduce setup latency from 6 RTTs to 2 RTTs when its optimizations are used together, with a direct impact on perceived performance and reliability.
